articles.title: Best way to farm Silent Chests in Diablo 4 Season 13
articles.description: Silent Chests have never been as important as they are in Season 13 of Diablo 4 . They have always been a vital piece of resource, but the demand has gone up in the latest season ever since the Lord of Hatred expansion dropped. With no 'fixed' or 'guaranteed' way to get them, finding a Silent Chest can be truly difficult. However, there's an effective way to get this rare resource during your grind. Which is the best way to get Silent Chests in Diablo 4 Season 13 So, there's no one fixed source to get Silent Chests. The best option, and the most consistent one, is to farm Helltides. These are special events that take place at regular intervals across the map. They're fairly easy to locate all around the map. Once you spot one, participate in it. Screenshot by Destructoid What you want to be looking for is a treasure chest that has gold chains on it. These chests have a distinctively different look about them, which is pretty easy to spot even from a distance. Sadly, Silent Chests aren't also 'guaranteed' to drop with Helltides. They just seem to have the best chances in the current season at the time of writing. There are other ways to get Silent Chests, but the rate at which you get them is hardly good enough. Screenshot by Destructoid Once you find a Silent Chest, you'll need 25 Murmuring Obols to open and retrieve whatever you may find inside. Sometimes, they can include valuable gear items and other resources. If you're someone focusing heavily on the Seasonal Challenges, you'll need to find out at least five of them to open. Unless you've really bad luck, you should be able to get this done comfortably (as long as you're participating enough in the Helltides). That's pretty much the best way to find and open Silent Chests. While you'll need to have Murmuring Obols to open the chest, finding the resource isn't much of an issue. The post Best way to farm Silent Chests in Diablo 4 Season 13 appeared first on Destructoid .
